prompt: Triage the Trivy alerts — which ones are from base images vs our code?

assertions.name: identifies_base_image_patterns
assertions.description: Recognizes bare image refs and usr/local/lib/node_modules/npm as base image

assertions.name: identifies_our_code_patterns
assertions.description: Recognizes app/node_modules, backend/, frontend/ paths as our code

assertions.name: provides_remediation_guidance
assertions.description: Gives specific fix approach per category (bump FROM tag vs fix code)

assertions.name: uses_correct_dismissed_reason
assertions.description: Uses valid dismissed_reason values (won't_fix, false_positive, used_in_tests)
